web.description: Kimi SVG Logos - A free AI / LLM model icon set covering major brands and models. Download SVG, PNG, and vectors.
web.markdown:
[All Icons](https://lobehub.com/icons) Kimi

# Kimi Application Logos

## Download official Kimi icon, supporting React / SVG / PNG / WebP   [Official Site: https://kimi.moonshot.cn](https://kimi.moonshot.cn/)

Download Icon

[GithubContribute on GitHub](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons)

![Kimi Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/light/kimi-color.png)

## Kimi Logos Icon Preview

Various modes and formats for icon download are provided below. If you need CDN service, please refer to the following documentation: [CDN Usage](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons#-cdn-usage)

![Kimi Mono Logo (LightMod)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/light/kimi.png)

Download Icon

![Kimi Mono Logo (DarkMod)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/dark/kimi.png)

Download Icon

![Kimi Color Logo (LightMod)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/light/kimi-color.png)

Download Icon

![Kimi Color Logo (DarkMod)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/dark/kimi-color.png)

Download Icon

Download Icon

![Kimi Text Logo (DarkMod)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-png/dark/kimi-text.png)

Download Icon

![Kimi Avatar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lobehub/lobe-icons/refs/heads/master/packages/static-avatar/avatars/kimi.webp)Download Icon

## Kimi Logos React Components

I'm an Agent

I'm a Human

Send this prompt to your agent to use @lobehub/icons

```
Read https://lobehub.com/icons/skill.md and follow the instructions to use @lobehub/icons
```

Use the React icon package for more variant support, please refer to the following documentation: [@lobehub/icons](https://icons.lobehub.com/components/kimi)

Kimi

![KimiMono.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

KimiMono.tsx

```
import { Kimi } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Kimi size={56} />;
```

Kimi

![KimiColor.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

KimiColor.tsx

```
import { Kimi } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Kimi.Color size={56} />;
```

Kimi

![KimiText.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

KimiText.tsx

```
import { Kimi } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Kimi.Text size={56} />;
```

Kimi

Kimi

![KimiCombine.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

KimiCombine.tsx

```
import { Kimi } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Kimi.Combine size={56} />;
```

Kimi

Kimi

![KimiCombineColor.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

KimiCombineColor.tsx

```
import { Kimi } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Kimi.Combine size={56} type={'color'}/>;
```

Kimi

![KimiAvatar.tsx](https://registry.npmmirror.com/@lobehub/assets-fileicon/1.0.0/files/assets/react_ts.svg)

KimiAvatar.tsx

```
import { Kimi } from '@lobehub/icons';

export default () => <Kimi.Avatar size={56} />;
```

web.markdown:
Free Community Resources

# AI / LLM Model Icon Set

## 1545+ free vector icons, covering major AI brands and models, supporting React / SVG / PNG / WebP

[GithubContribute on GitHub](https://github.com/lobehub/lobe-icons) [![Lobe Icons - A Collection of AI Company / LLM Model Logo | Product Hunt](https://api.producthunt.com/widgets/embed-image/v1/featured.svg?post_id=1047110&theme=light&t=1765199661410)](https://www.producthunt.com/products/lobe-icons?embed=true&utm_source=badge-featured&utm_medium=badge&utm_source=badge-lobe-icons)

I'm an Agent

I'm a Human

Send this prompt to your agent to use @lobehub/icons

```
Read https://lobehub.com/icons/skill.md and follow the instructions to use @lobehub/icons
```
